objective: Reconcile C5 significance and scheduler closure obligations against verified C4, preserving capability-free deterministic proof and excluding later systems and runtime authority.

research_gate: C5 portability is independently verified for the isolated game-facing proof contract: clean Windows x64/i686 observations, Android compile-only evidence, hosted Linux run 29678602236, local Sigstore replay, 40 importer hostiles, 19 retained-replay hostiles and fresh independent review all pass. Forge itself was not ported. Only read-only ProofReceipt binding may proceed; closure, promotion and C6 authority remain withheld.
authority_lane: Owner-authorized bounded C5 significance/scheduler implementation and capability-free closure proof only. Exact dependency C4. Frozen candidate G1_C5_CLOSURE_READINESS.md. No C3B, C6, C7, broad G1 closure, runtime controllers, runtime executors, cache mutation, storage mutation, product weights, AI generation, rendering implementation, filesystem, network, process, Companion, Greenfield, visual assets or Kernel mutation.
context_health: C4 remains verified and C5 remains the sole active item. C5 local hardening and portability are independently verified at exact source 9e48dd1; the isolated proof contract, not Forge, reproduced semantic SHA-256 88e2be61586e728613fe2c7bf5b947074459fc5f63d6e5f13d4f4648e64624eb on hosted Linux. The active substage is now read-only ProofReceipt integration. C5 closure, C6, C7, broad G1 closure and R1 remain gated.

macro_findings: The owner retained the canonical broad route C4 then C5 then C6 then C7 then G1-CLOSEOUT then R1.
C4 consumes exact C2 and promoted C3A; C3B physical and presentation evidence is independent and blocked.
Population ecology and species presentation belong to C6, rendered visual proof belongs to C7, and runtime storage belongs to R1.
C4 is verified and complete; C5 is the sole active item. C6-C7, broad G1-CLOSEOUT and R1 remain unchanged and gated.
The current C5 closure requires exactly generation, simulation, AI, physics, animation, audio, rendering and streaming from one shared significance truth.
The old four-domain one-gap interpretation is superseded; cache remains a capability-free residency-intent proof, not a ninth domain or cache implementation.
micro_findings: Stable dynamic identity, four-state presence, retained ambient cohort binding, exact dependency availability, typed prefix recovery, topology refusal and one/two-hop migrations pass hostile tests.
The semantic receipt replays the exact C3A input and packet through addressable-world-binding and binds pinned deterministic cost rows.
Two fresh Windows x64 processes and same-host i686 execution emit semantic SHA-256 263a7c274c5bbfb5a48f0a7ccf3462eb35ddc7c96c1c92ff01d8ef37a40f6996.
Android aarch64 compilation is compile-only; independent platform-diverse execution remains a separate receipt.

The retained fixture lock and 27-path blob manifest bind the portable proof surface; 36 external hostiles and 15 retained-replay hostiles reject forged policy, source, runner, artifact, output, attestation, retention and authority evidence.

The public GitHub repository is connected. Hosted run 29671494578 separated read-only execution from attestation authority and was rejected locally before import when it exposed CRLF/LF tree serialization drift.

Canonical LF tree binding for the hardened C5-successor surface is clean source 17f39f7018de8a02c8292bcde0fafa2bf58fc7d4 with tracked-tree SHA-256 3b0bb235e5a3159ecba5b4d34acfd6157725773af79584e3b801283b8442e4dd and bounded-source SHA-256 b31d92b7ebf36540a64249192fca96d83537c01932ededf84c94e1a886acc108.

GitHub-hosted run 29674024317 executed and attested exact source 17f39f7; strict import and retained replay verify current independent result SHA-256 2430d21047166c7e177047b5d44862fcaffe41f33cf663c678aa3b754272fbdd.
The retained 18 tests remain green and 72 new tests bring the hardened local candidate to 90 total Rust tests.

The first independent review blocked portability on optional truth verification, stale fallback escape, non-round-trippable duplicate rejection receipts, missing pressure composition and strict-Clippy failures.

The hardened candidate binds verified truth fingerprints into admission receipts and replay, makes unverified admission non-accepting, quarantines inactive fallbacks on epoch advance, validates rejection reason codes, runs ten composed pressure scenarios and passes strict Clippy.
All 92 frozen hostile IDs now map to executable local evidence, including strict ticket/budget replay and capability-negative authority tests.
C5 remains open pending fresh independent re-review, then a frozen semantic receipt, fresh-process and target-diverse portability, read-only ProofReceipt integration and the full gate.

visual_quality_gate.rationale: C5 is a capability-free significance/scheduler proof and uses no visual asset, renderer or creative-quality claim.

tiers_completed.result: The C4 audit reconciles exact C2+C3A ownership, existing bounded proofs, missing adversarial cases, later-system exclusions and portability classifications.

tiers_completed.result: All 58 core hostile IDs and exact deterministic cost rows pass in capability-free Rust fixtures.
Exact C2+C3A semantic receipt, eight receipt hostiles, two fresh native processes, same-host i686 execution, Android compile and C4V regression pass.
Thirty-six external receipt hostiles and pinned workflow-control assertions fail closed without granting independence.

GitHub-hosted Ubuntu run 29674024317 executed two concurrent native processes at exact C5-successor source 17f39f7 and produced a strictly imported, cryptographically replayable authority-negative receipt; prior receipts are archived intact.
Three independent audits reconciled the exact eight-domain surface, contradicted stale one-gap wording and froze 92 hostile cases plus authority exclusions.
The retained capability-free prototype passes 18 focused tests; the exact readiness and forged-route suites pass without authorizing implementation source.

simulation_ladder.unresolved_risk: Implementation authority is absent; the frozen candidate repairs real truth-binding and completion-state gaps but must remain capability-free and avoid product-policy selection.
simulation_ladder.expected_information_gain: An owner decision determines whether the frozen minimal candidate may proceed to test-first source implementation.
simulation_ladder.estimated_cost: No further execution at this gate; implementation and portability costs begin only after explicit authorization.
simulation_ladder.regression_guard: No C3B, C6-C7, broad G1 closure, runtime controller or executor, cache, storage, filesystem, network, process, Companion, Greenfield, visual asset or Kernel mutation.
simulation_ladder.stop_condition: Stop before source if any named domain, fairness obligation, fallback rule, authority exclusion or deterministic hostile case remains ambiguous.
simulation_ladder.final_integration_gate: Post-transition registered regression run-71ef6dfd6e2945ab9745c85f3dcf4d6b passed; another registered gate remains required after a separately accepted C5 implementation candidate.

exit_criteria.label: C5 depends exactly on verified C4 and imports no C3B, later-system, storage or runtime authority.
Every named generation, simulation, AI, physics, animation, audio, rendering and streaming obligation is mapped to one shared significance truth.
Deterministic dispatch, admission, budget, fallback, cancellation, fairness, starvation and thrash hostiles are frozen before source.
A separately authorized C5 implementation, focused regressions, independent review and one registered full Forge gate pass without activating C6.

unresolved_risks: Read-only ProofReceipt integration must bind the verified C5 receipt identity and semantic hash without changing canonical object, event or candidate counts, importing runtime authority, or converting evidence into promotion or C6 authority.
evidence_requirements: retain exact verified C4 as C5's sole dependency
retain the exact eight-domain matrix and superseding one-resource, packet-state, cache-lease and trace-code decisions
retain the minimal additive candidate records and all 92 frozen hostile IDs
require explicit owner authorization before product-source mutation
keep C6-C7, G1-CLOSEOUT and R1 gated and unchanged
verification_plan: retain the three independent canonical, code and hostile audits
verify the exact C5 route, authority, eight-domain matrix and 92 hostile IDs
reject forged route, authority, C4 state, C5 dependency and hostile registry fixtures
at the owner gate, authorize or reject only the frozen minimal additive candidate
after authorization, run focused implementation and registered gates without activating C6
resume_after: Continue only through the frozen capability-free C5 implementation and verification candidate; do not activate C6 automatically.

C4V closed cleanly in commit 34f2213 and registered run-fa6334a300e04d409dd5cddb4f22542e.

C4 depends exactly on C2 and promoted C3A; C3B remains independent and blocked.
Four existing C4-owned modules pass 33 of 33 focused tests while retaining no runtime, storage, network or filesystem capability.
Independent GP4 pre-source acceptance recorded after the composed readiness gate passed in 73.9 seconds with the source crate absent and all exact hostile mutations failing closed.
Both independent reviewers accepted the source candidate after 9 of 9 focused hostile tests, strict received-evidence replay, capability audit, formatting and focused clippy passed.
The 100.8-second GP4 focused integration verifier passed formatting, clippy, 9 hostile vertical tests, retained GP0-GP3 and C4V tests, computation readiness and all readiness hostiles.

G1_VERTICAL_CLOSEOUT_RECEIPT.json remains immutable verified predecessor evidence.

Two fresh native processes and same-host Windows i686 execution emitted identical semantic bytes; aarch64-linux-android compiled only. None is independent second-platform execution.

The first registered post-import gate replayed the C4 attestation, then failed on C3 closure-register retention drift; the register now preserves current superseded-C3/promoted-C3A/blocked-C3B truth plus residual/ecotone anchors, and all five affected focused shields pass.

The second registered attempt passed the C3 repair and later failed because three retained GP3/GP4/vertical-closeout verifiers omitted only c4-independent-platform-gate; exact-stage additions and the existing forged-route successor suite now pass without widening authority.

The third registered attempt passed through retained hosted-attestation replay and the repaired successor routes, then failed because the local observation verifier incorrectly required historical and rebuilt MSVC debug PE bytes to match. Two clean target-directory builds produced distinct executable hashes with exact semantic output; the bounded repair validates both hashes as per-execution identities without weakening hosted same-run artifact equality.

GitHub-hosted run 29672946787 independently executed and attested exact repaired source f505c82; strict import and retained cryptographic replay verify result SHA-256 733d453f0831cdaafefa9d4a9e24b1494f339b0b56f4441264009c9fcc3254cd. The prior 8651038 receipt remains archived intact.
Three independent C5 audits reconciled canonical obligations, 2,134 lines of retained code and adversarial gaps; 18 focused tests and the historical F5 verifier pass but do not close C5.
G1_C5_CLOSURE_READINESS.md freezes exactly eight domains, superseding contract decisions, a minimal additive candidate, 92 hostile IDs and the capability-negative owner gate before source.

The hardened C5 candidate passes 90 Rust tests, strict Clippy, all 92 frozen hostile mappings and ten composed pressure scenarios; fresh independent re-review accepted advancement to portability only.

GitHub-hosted run 29678602236 executed exact source 9e48dd1 in two overlapping native Linux x64 processes; credential-separated attestation, local cryptographic replay and fresh independent review accepted portability for the isolated proof contract only.
